creator: bugreports@byterider.net
text:
It seems that the rc-script "munin-node.sh" is not included in the binary
package "munin-node" included in FreeBSD 6.3-Release and 7.0-Release.

Fix: 

Rebuild package(?)

Compiling from ports works fine for me.
How-To-Repeat: # pkg_add -r munin-node
.....

You need a group "munin".
Would you like me to create it [y]? 
Done.
Initializing plugins..done.
./+INSTALL: /usr/local/etc/rc.d/munin-node.sh: not found
